title: Histoskins
description: [DISCONTINUED] Mod that allows users to see Histolauncher's custom skins & capes in Multiplayer servers for clients 1.20.2 and above.
body:
### _As of Histolauncher b1.4.2, this mod is no longer required to load Histolauncher skins and capes in Multiplayer servers. The launcher has found and fixed the problem._

---

**This Minecraft Mod allows users to see Histolauncher's custom skins & capes in Multiplayer servers for Minecraft clients 1.20.2 and above.**

This solves an issue with the new skin rework Mojang did to 1.20.2, which causes skins & capes to completely fail to load on Multiplayer servers for Histolauncher users due to stricter signature verifications.

_This mod only affects Multiplayer server or LAN worlds!_

Forge version is coming soon!

Works both for Histolauncher and Official launcher.
